footer.description: Virkavastuu.fi is a civic platform promoting transparency and accountability in Finnish public governance.
footer.openData: All information is based on public sources.

hero.title: Know your officials
hero.subtitle: Virkavastuu.fi aggregates public information about Finnish civil servants and enables citizen feedback.

profiles.title: Official profiles
profiles.description: Comprehensive profiles of senior civil servants: appointment date, background, organizations, and public statements.

sources.title: Source-linked data
sources.description: All profile data links to original public sources: lausunto.fi, valtioneuvosto.fi, PRH, media archives.

feedback.title: Citizen feedback
feedback.description: Theme-based ratings per policy area, with results showing sample size and distribution.

officials.title: Officials
officials.description: Browse and search profiles of senior Finnish civil servants.
officials.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, position, or organization...

feedback.title: Citizen feedback
feedback.verificationSent: A verification email has been sent to your address.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Virkavastuu.fi promotes transparency in Finnish public governance. We aggregate public information about civil servants in significant positions of power and enable citizens to provide feedback on their performance by policy area.

step1.title: Public profiles
step1.description: We collect information about appointments, backgrounds, organizational affiliations, and public statements — all from public sources.

step2.title: Source-linked data
step2.description: Every piece of profile data links to its original public source, so you can verify the accuracy yourself.

step3.title: Citizen feedback
step3.description: Rate an official's performance by policy area. Results show sample size and distribution — not a simple up/down vote.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All data and methods are open and verifiable.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: Information is based on official public sources and regularly verified.

fairness.title: Fairness
fairness.description: We do not make value judgments — we present data and citizen feedback as-is.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: We only process public information about people in public office. Feedback submitters' data is protected.

dataPolicy.title: Data policy
dataPolicy.description: All profile data is sourced from public records: lausunto.fi, valtioneuvosto.fi, PRH, media archives, and agency websites. We do not use private data sources and do not collect information without public justification. Feedback email addresses are hashed and never stored in plain text.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: Found an error in a profile? Want to suggest additions? Contact us at info@virkavastuu.fi.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred. Please try reloading the page.
